title: [MTR3/4] Non Standard Gauge Rail
description: This resource pack adds 1,067mm(3 ft 6 in), 1,600mm & 762mm gauge railway tracks for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
![different gauges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2913bad59abeedc7e6ce11c373e7fec76f602018.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds 1,067mm (3 ft 6 in)gauge tracks.

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 (NTE)

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

## Contetns

Each gauge have default, siding & brown type rail

* 1,067mm gauge rail (for MTR4)
* 1,600mm gauge rail
* 762mm gauge rail
